about.shortBio: I build software, tinker with electronics, and run my own homelab.
about.longBio: Software engineer with a passion for building clean, performant code. Outside of work, I enjoy embedded projects, digital electronics experiments, and maintaining server infrastructure in my home data center.

projects.title: T-Learning
projects.longDescription: Web application for language learning with interactive lessons, spaced repetition, and progress tracking.

projects.longDescription: Modern product catalogue with full-text search, filters, and external supplier API integration.

projects.title: Rohan
projects.longDescription: Travel planning app for organizing expenses, itineraries, and sharing memories with fellow travelers.

projects.title: DOCX-App
projects.description: DOCX document generator in the browser.
projects.longDescription: Application for generating advanced DOCX documents from templates with live preview and export.
